heading: Blackmail
label: 873 Blackmail
text: Whoever, under a threat of informing, or as a consideration for not informing, against any violation of any law of the United States, demands or receives any money or other valuable thing, shall be fined under this title or imprisoned not more than one year, or both.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased upon title 18, U.S.C., 1940 ed., § 250 (, ).Mar. 4, 1909, ch. 321, § 14535 Stat. 1114Only minor changes were made in phraseology.
Amendments1994— substituted “fined under this title” for “fined not more than $2,000”.Pub. L. 103–322
